name: IRC_MEDIA_LINKS_VL
query: SELECT B.MEDIA_LINK_ID MEDIA_LINK_ID, B.MEDIA_TYPE_CODE MEDIA_TYPE_CODE, TL.TITLE TITLE, B.URL URL, B.THUMBNAIL_URL THUMBNAIL_URL, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_MEDIA_LINKS_B B, IRC_MEDIA_LINKS_TL TL WHERE B.MEDIA_LINK_ID = TL.MEDIA_LINK_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
